title: Roasted Portuguese Pork Roast
description: A traditional Portuguese dish featuring a slow-roasted pork shoulder with a soy sauce and shio-koji cure, perfect for a lazy Sunday meal. The result is a tender, flavorful, and pillowy roast with a delightful savory sauce.

ingredients.name: Soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, low-sodium soy sauce.

ingredients.name: Shio-koji cure
ingredients.notes: You can make your own shio-koji cure by fermenting rice koji in saltwater.

ingredients.name: Brown sugar
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, pure cane sugar.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince the garlic for best results.

ingredients.name: Black pepper
ingredients.notes: Use whole black peppercorns for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh rosemary
ingredients.notes: Use fresh rosemary for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality, extra-virgin olive oil.

ingredients.name: Chicken broth
ingredients.notes: Use a low-sodium chicken broth or make your own.
